def positive_repeated_directory_scan_inside_nested_loop():
    rule_id = "repeated_directory_scan_inside_nested_loop"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag nested loops that rescan the same directory or file listing."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
